# Long Claude Description

## Deliverable

Return a structured package description.

## Contract

This skill produces a reviewed skill package draft and does not promise deterministic transforms.

## Edge Cases

- If the request is ambiguous, name the chosen interpretation.

## Example

Example request: "Turn this workflow into a skill."
